description: The Boolean Spatial Variable Driver component is specifically for boolean values, which combines all the found bool spatial values at given point

fields.Drive: The field to drive with the combined values of all the bools at the sampled slot point.
fields.Mode: How to aggrigate values to determine the final result.
fields.DefaultValue: The value to default to when no value can be sampled.

usage: attach to a slot for it to use as the sample point. then it will sample spatial areas around it to get it's value.
